resources.title: Uncertainty in Deep Learning
resources.description: A practical guide to Bayesian methods, Monte Carlo dropout, and conformal prediction for building models that know what they don't know.

resources.title: AI for Healthcare Professionals
resources.description: Non-technical primers on how AI works, how to evaluate AI products, and what questions to ask before deploying AI in clinical settings.

resources.title: The Technical Founder's Toolkit
resources.description: Resources compiled for engineers stepping into entrepreneurship — from cap tables to customer discovery to building culture from day one.
